title: "better" Villager Voices
description: This pack makes the villagers talk, idk if its better, but it is funny.
body: This pack makes the villagers sound better (well not better, but does make them funny). I voiced the villagers, but I tried to sound like Element X's Villager News Villagers, so they may sound familiar if I did good. If you want them to be quieter use [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/).
